Author: Uki
Name: GlamourousGallery
Description: Browse Glamourer designs as a thumbnail gallery, apply them quickly, and organize them with favorites, hidden entries, tags, and custom cropped thumbnails. Use /glamgallery to open the gallery.
Changelog:
-1.1.0.0
    Added Tag Colors. Added folder support. Added favorites button. Added settings for sorting favorites. Fixed overwriting thumbnails.
